info.title: RefitGenerator
info.description: A tool to generate Refit client code from OpenApi definitions

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A utility to generate Refit client code from OpenApi json or yaml

options.name: url
options.description: A url to OpenApi json or yaml

options.name: file
options.description: Path to OpenApi json or yaml file

options.name: groupingStrategy
options.description: Strategy for grouping paths into api interfaces

options.name: executable
options.description: Generate a .NET 5 console app instead of .NET Standard 2.0 library

options.name: ignoredHeaders
options.description: Provides a list of headers to ignore

options.name: addEqualsNullToOptionalParameters
options.description: Makes optional parameters have a default null value in api interfaces

options.name: conflictingNameAffix
options.description: A string a property name will be prefixed with to avoid conflict with the enclosing type name

options.name: prefixConflictingName
options.description: Whether to prefix or suffix the conflicting property name with configured affix

options.name: skipDeprecatedProperties
options.description: Whether to skip deprecated properties or include them with [Obsolete] attribute
